_comment: Auto-update manifest consumed by tauri-plugin-updater. Updated alongside each tagged release. The signature field carries a minisign signature of the corresponding installer; the matching public key is baked into apps/desktop/tauri.conf.json under plugins.updater.pubkey.
notes: Mycelium v0.76.0-beta.1 — direct UX response to the v0.75 feedback. (1) Custom in-app modal replaces window.confirm/alert/prompt — no more 'tauri.localhost says' chrome on delete confirms or anywhere else. (2) Settings UI redesign (Phase 2 of the remake plan, brought forward): orphan-checkbox bug fixed, card-style group panels, token-based spacing, hover-row tinting. (3) Two new settings: UI density preset (Compact / Comfortable / Spacious) and editor line-height (1.3..2.0). See https://github.com/Arka-ui/mycelium/releases/tag/v0.76.0-beta.1 for full notes.
